aboutPage.title: About VietNews 24h
aboutPage.intro: VietNews 24h is a news platform focused on speed, reliability, and a modern reading experience. We prioritize valuable content, clearly edited and continuously updated.
aboutPage.missionText: Connect readers with high-quality information to help them quickly and accurately understand the full picture.
aboutPage.value3: User experience first across all devices.

contactPage.intro: If you have content feedback, partnership requests, or system issue reports, please send us your information.
contactPage.address: Address: 25 Nguyen Hue, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City

common.default: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

http.400: Invalid request. Please check your submitted data.

http.500: The system is busy. Please try again later.
